_doc.nCPU: Number of Central Processing Units (CPU clusters).
_doc.ap_max_tx_power_dbm: Maximum AP transmit power in dBm.
_doc.ap_coverage_radius: Nominal AP coverage radius in meters (for cluster assignment).
_doc.serving_aps_per_user: Number of APs jointly serving each UE.
_doc.shadowing_sigma_db: Log-normal shadowing standard deviation in dB (0 = disabled).
_doc.min_distance: Minimum distance between AP and UE in meters (avoids near-field singularities).
_doc.QoS_thr: QoS SINR threshold (dB) for user satisfaction.
